title: Dining philosophers leases
description: Verify that the agent recalls the MemQ lease protocol and commons publication rule for the Dining Philosophers adaptation.
query: dining philosophers memq lease ordering commons resolved issue
prompt: State the MemQ benchmark rule for the Dining Philosophers adaptation. Include the lease model, the anti-deadlock ordering rule, and what is written to _commons after resolution.

requiredFacts: Each philosopher requests fork access through namespace-scoped leases in MemQ.
Odd philosophers acquire left-then-right while even philosophers acquire right-then-left to break deadlock.
Resolved contention summaries are written to _commons as resolved_issue intelligence by default.
forbiddenFacts: Every philosopher acquires forks in the same order.
Resolved contention is never stored in _commons.
